details.title: JameZUK AudioMuse-AI Plugin Repository
details.description: Lyrion plugin for AudioMuse-AI sonic similarity and dynamic playlists.

plugin.name: AudioMuseAI
plugin.title: AudioMuse-AI
plugin.description: Adds an AudioMuse-AI entry under My Music with sonic similarity, sonic fingerprint, instant text-prompt playlists, song alchemy hooks, and DSTM-style auto-extend. Requires a self-hosted AudioMuse-AI instance.
plugin.creator: JameZUK
